caption: A man with light-colored hair and glasses, wearing a dark blue t-shirt and headphones, appears in a small picture-in-picture overlay in the bottom-left corner of a video game screen. He is in a room with a decorated Christmas tree visible behind him. The main screen displays a menu for a "90+ ZERO CHILL PLAYER" pack, featuring an image of an American football player's helmet and the text "90+ OVR". A purchase option is visible, stating "BUY WITH" and showing a cost of "20,000 Training". Controls at the bottom read "BUY VIEW INFO HELP CANCEL". As the video progresses, the man's facial expressions shift from a look of anticipation to an excited, open-mouthed smile and laughter, while the game interface remains static across the frames.
